items.claim: Anna Malissiano is taking this fight on short notice.
Anna Malissiano does not defend her hands well when her back is taken.
items.quote: Anna doesn't really fight the hands especially when she has her back taken.

items.claim: Alvin Hines' only professional loss was to Janata Denise.
items.quote: Alvin Hines only pro loss to Janata Denise.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is durable and can take a beating.
items.quote: He's very tough though, very durable.

items.claim: Stewart Nickel is susceptible to body shots.
items.quote: He is susceptible to those body shots.

items.claim: Stewart Nickel's takedown threat is not effective.
items.quote: his takedown threat is not really that good.

items.claim: Damen Anderson has a 100% finish rate.
Ezra Elliot has a 100% finish rate.
Levy Rodriguez gassed out after exerting all his energy in his Contender Series fight.
items.quote: He completely gassed after just exerting all of his energy

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a 100% finish rate.
Felipe Franco is prone to gassing out if he fights at a high pace.
items.quote: he can gas as the fight goes on if he's fighting at a very high pace
